entries.definition:
n–w–ʾ a star approaching its celestial setting point; to be
weighed down with difficulties, to be strained by, or succumb
under a heavy load; hostility. Of this root, تَنُوء tanūʾ, occurs once
in the Qur’an.

تَنُوء tanūʾ [imperf. of v. نَاء naʾa, intrans.] to weigh down, to
strain, to overburden (28:76) وَآتَيْنَاهُ مِنَ الْكُنُوزِ مَا إِنَّ مَفَاتِحَهُ لَتَنُوءُ بِالْعُصْبَةِ
أُولِي الْقُوَّةِ and We had given him such treasures that their keys
would have weighed down a [whole] company of strong men.

under a heavy load; hostility. Of this root, تَنُوء tanūʾ, occurs once

تَنُوء tanūʾ [imperf. of v. نَاء naʾa, intrans.] to weigh down, to
